# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/gatagat/lap/issues/57
# repo: gatagat/lap
# title: Error when installing (already have numpy and visual cpp build tools)

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # Collecting lap==0.4.0
    # Using cached lap-0.4.0.tar.gz (1.5 MB)
    # Installing build dependencies ... done
    # Getting requirements to build wheel ... done
    # Preparing metadata (pyproject.toml) ... error
    # error: subprocess-exited-with-error
    # × Preparing metadata (pyproject.toml) did not run successfully.
    # │ exit code: 1
    # ╰─> [21 lines of output]
    raise ImportError('reproduce: see https://github.com/gatagat/lap/issues/57')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
